mapper.select: SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM BIF.TB_UPLOAD A
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BIF.TB_UPLOAD(file_name, regist_date, regist_id, status, max_date) VALUES( #{file_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, now(), #{regist_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{max_date, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: SELECT to_char(MAX(max_date),'YYYYMMDDhh24ssmm') FROM BIF.TB_UPLOAD where status = 'success'
